reviews.review_description: Overall the gameplay is fun and immersive the missions are silly but the game can be beaten in just a few hours. Now I understand that they have an endless mode but even that gets redundant after a while. Here's a few suggestions for new jobs: Bartender, factory worker, etc. So great game but could use a bit more to it

I saw many users on YouTube playing this, and it seemed really fun. It in fact was very fun, I finished the entire game. I thought it would be super boring after I finished but I was wrong and kinda right at the same time. Once you finish all the jobs, you get a bunch of mods. The mods were fun for a few minutes, until I realized it was just the same levels but with 0 gravity or something like that. Anyway, great game. Add more levels.

Overall this game has potential, but it does need updates once in a while. I have beat this game over many times and I get bored after a while. This game could add a job factory, banker, thief, cop, and many more. I would love to see the developers put in more work into this game.

Thanks for reading!

This game has three modes you can play once you finish the tutorial for all three modes you just play the game. This game would be more enjoyable if you didn’t have to press or grab something to start the next task you have to do I wish there was a setting to turn it off because it annoys me. I wish the game would let you move around but instead you are walking in real life to get the thing you need. I wish that there was a fast play setting were you would have a certain amount of time to complete the amount of tasks you get in that time. Overall this game is fun but it can get boring very easy because sometimes you are just doing the same thing over and over again.

Can you just overflow the world with bananas on the store level where you get held up?



Also, I just gave him a newspaper 🤣🤣🤣

reviews.review_title: Very good game but needs more updates!
reviews.review_description: This game is very easy to complete and it’s boring having to be alone, they need to add multiplayer somehow or add like a massive update to fix its popularity. A lot of people have this game, vacation sim and more games by these devs and they just keep it on their device without playing it, just leaving them to rot. So they should revive the game really and make it funnier to play

this was a fun game. I would recommend worth the money? Yes, definitely for a first VR players game. I think this is a really good first game the only thing that I thought was a bit annoying was that you can only play four games on this game I would've preferred if there was more option, but overall I would give this four stars out of five🙂￼
They should’ve said this game was a horror game based off the name I installed it not knowing then I got a jump scare ￼
I love this game… but I finished the whole thing in no time… and I have NEVER finished a game! Please add more levels, I will buy it immediately!

I wish I still had my meta quest 2 back in 2026, this game was great, the cartoony characteristics were just perfect 🤩. Back in 2023-2025 I was being to generous to everyone and Let whoever wanted to play it could play it. (They have never played before and many almost broke it) In the end, I was left with crippling controllers, poor battery health+life, damaged headset (physical) and whenever I played the game would switch my POV from front to back (in game) im hoping to buy a quest 3 but I have to save cuz im to young to get a job. Please send this to meta, when I first got it, it was like magic 🪄 but then in late 2025, it felt like all that magic was taken away from my own hands for being to kind. SEND TO META PLEASE 🥺

It’s a bit confusing about what we should do I know they give us some instructions but people who are new they wouldn’t understand just like me.. I was working the mechanic and didn’t know what to do same as office worker the two easy jobs are the chef and the store clerk overall it should have more guidance and I reccomend u buy this game since it’s fun but the developers should REALLY add more jobs to choose from because $20 for 4 games? It’s reasonable but I expected more!!

developer_response.body: Hey Martahiix, thanks for your feedback! Make sure you have your sound on and the volume up so you can hear the instructions given by the bots throughout each job. Happy jobbing!

reviews.review_description: This is a great game been out for a while wish the chef had a updated sandwich maker like in vacation simulator and perhaps few new jobs. it the best part of the game is the story’s each one has.  Endless mode is fun but get repetitive after a while.  So I think this is a great first vr game just wish there where more jobs than the four it was made with
The games replayability is below 0, everything gets boring when you beat it, and you cant even get a refund, is fun when you first play it
Good but needs jobs like police offers car cleaner etc

reviews.review_title: Job bot says: get to work!
reviews.review_description:
I love this game, especially when you get mods after you've completed every job, which takes around 2 hours average. The jobs are hilarious, especially when you can feed little Timmy wine and eggshell pizza in gourmet chef, and when you can take out the pistons in this blokes car and give him a nuclear bomb for the car battery in auto mechanic! 
But I sometimes load in 5ft above the air which might be a little bug but I just have to restart the game!
God game but I beet half of the jobs in under 2 hours needs more stuff to do

Honestly, this game was the first ever vr game I ever played. And I LOVED IT it was astounding just to see me being able to pick up items and doing jobs. This game has helped through my childhood and I will never forget this is how I started VR.
Ngl this game is peak✌️🥹

reviews.review_title: Keep the work up under paid employees
reviews.review_description: I love jobbing the one where you fix cars is my personal favorite job #happyjobbing
I bought this game last night and I legitimately finished within 2 hours. There are a lack of jobs, there are plenty jobs in the world that could be added to the game. But over all it’s a fun game.
Everyone Should Play This Game It’s So Fun

This game is amazing and cool, but I played it for a week and man, I finished everything. Each type of job has about 17 stages or less. Then after you finish everything, I wonder what to do because the mode that lets you work at night, which gives you more time to play, not including the stages, just repeats itself. Everything is the same there. I would love for you to add more stages.
I have to sell my vr now because job Simulator won’t let me nomater how much I try😭😡😭😡😭😡😭😡😭😡😭😡😭

developer_response.body: We'd love to help but we're going to need a bit more information about what's going on. Reach out to us with the details at owlchemysupport@google.com.

reviews.review_title: Good game but could be more to it
reviews.review_description: Okej so the game is not worth the money for the few things that exist you play though the whole game in like 2h. But during thees 2h you have a little bit of fun. I would want more jobs tho be added
Its an amazing game it’s definitely worth your time and money
I really enjoy playing this game along with all the other Owlchemy labs games I’ve purchased. This game is great if you’re looking for a relaxing story game

This game is really fun cause it’s like a real job and when I’m older I wanna be a job like I’m gonna do the same thing that I did in it. I’m gonna throw stuff around and I write it five stars cause it’s really fun for me.

The game was very fun doing all of the jobs BUT there are only 4 jobs and after you complete them all there's nothing to do apart from infinite over time but that's not that fun either. Apart from that it's very fun and you get mods at the end. I recommend buying.

reviews.review_title: Weird why did it find old version
reviews.review_description: I got in job sim but I see no voice buttons and information, and all jobs look old and outdated, is this a reversion or something or am I just getting crazy

Don’t get me wrong this game is AMAZING but I think it needs a little bit more maps. The game is very fun to play. Hope to see more maps! <3
-NiceguyO-o
The game is so good but I wish they added more after the vaccination one

The game was fun cause how emersive it is the story fun game modes funnnn.  

EVERYTHING FUNNNNN

This games is really good and you experience jobs such as Office Worker, Chef, Mechanic, Store clerk. I would recommend this game to people who want an accurate simulation of these jobs but I do hope in the future they add more jobs too the game

I seen a lot of people make content on this on YouTube and I tried it out I loved it but I wish it was a tad bit longer it was it only took me 3 Days to beat and or I wish for a sequel please make one thank you very much and you got my five star review

This game is a bit of a letdown. It took me under a hour to beat, and it gets repetitive FAST. Sure its always fun to call jobbot a clanker and throw stuff but besides that theres almost nothing but infinite overtime left to do, and even that isn't too fun. In short, you were good, im waiting for you to be great.

A few years ago, I never had a headset but I used to watch my favorite YouTubers play VR games all the time. I ended up stumbling upon a video about a game called “Job Simulator”, and that changed my life. I never even played it but I knew it would be awesome. Turns out I was right. 5 stars.

reviews.review_description: I am having trouble getting in my job and its weirds because all my friends aren’t having that problem

developer_response.body: If this persists after reinstalling, we're here to help! Contact our support team at owlchemysupport@google.com.

reviews.review_description: W this is so fun

I spend 20.00 thinking this would be a great new game to play but no all you do is play it over and over it so repetitive and the whole game feels like your doing one big tutorial wish I could refund this game
This game is really fun & calming but to bad im playing it with horizon plus keep working on the game devs and also i love the hand tracking update
i am human. I job.
Love this game

reviews.review_title: One of the best games ever
reviews.review_description: I beat the game. I loved it especially the supermarket or whatever you call it the mods they’re OK. The gas station is a little long. I like the office and the chef is my most favorite.

The game is really fun and good. The modes you unlock are super cool but there are only four jobs. I think the game would b a little bit more fun if there were more jobs, like a teacher or bank worker even a criminal job would make it more fun. There should also be more modes like short human or phantom mode were you would see stuff that you can’t interact with. I really like the game but with just a few more jobs and modes it would be so much more fun.

I would say to play it it fun very fun it come with many jobs for you to play and it's fun
I love it
The levels are similar and buggy

developer_response.body: If you're having issues, we'd love to help support you. Reach out to us at owlchemysupport@google.com

reviews.review_description: The game is fun, but only for a couple weeks. After a while, Golding every job isn’t hard and overtime gets boring because it’s the same 5 tasks. If they could add more jobs or more tasks I think this game would be revived for a short while. Co-op would be so fun.

reviews.review_title: Only blue color job is mechanical car
reviews.review_description: Add blue color jobs like welding and construction
It’s a very fun game in till you beat it then it gets a little boring you should make more jobs  and a bit more stages it is still fun you should buy this game
This game is super fun, but you should add more levels or more jobs, maybe even a house mode where you can be at home and play around in it, please.

The only reason I'm not giving 5 stars is the main game is pretty short I finished the game in 3 hours. The game itself is awesome, the 4 jobs office worker chief auto mechanic and My favorite Store Clerk. The store clerk job is the most popular especially on YouTube and TikTok. If your on vr  spend the $20 you won't regret

developer_response.body: We're so glad you loved [JOB] human!

reviews.review_description:
It’s pretty nice. I like the YouTube videos on it. Five stars. 
￼

i got job simulator over a year ago and love playing it to this day! there so many different modes and when u complete the levels just to infinite overtime which is never ending levels with different things every time! this game is the best purchase i’ve made for a while. i can tell it’s professionally built. ❤️❤️

It is a good game even if it is a bit repetitive which doesn’t matter much when it only takes 2 hours to beat the whole game. It is also annoying how there is no in game camera rotation. All the levels are set to a fixed rotation so playing in a just big enough rectangular space is hard with how it is crooked making it hard to reach items sometimes. overall would recommend only if you have a lot of play space and just want a quick experience.

So I’m 16 and my mom says I need to get a job, So I apply for a store clerk and I got the job. I had a lot of fun. But the job bot was really rude and I had to work every day of the week. Another thing is I got robbed on day 16 and he robbed me with a banananana I give him all my cheddar and he leaves. The police comes and brings a robber a guy on his phone and an elderly woman. So I choose the elderly woman cause i think she robbed me.

Now I’m 27 and I work as a mechanic ￼It was all fun but my boss liked to scam bots. Anyway on day 14 a bandit comes and tells me to remodel his car. Who am I to judge!?!? So I remodel his car and he leaves then I find out he was a robber who woulda thought?

Now I’m 38 and I work in an office now. On day 6 I get promoted and someone brings me cake everyone takes their slice but then…. THERES NONE FOR ME. Anyway on day seven and guy gives me money to buy them something from a vending machine so I buy my self a soft pretzel.


Now I’m 49 and I’m a gourmet chef. This was definitely my best job but  on day 26 Gordon Botsy SHOWS UP AT MY RESTAURANT. He films a  episode acting rude but  the dude was really nice. 

Now I’m 60 and I’m a bank manager with three kids Jrbit/ 16 yo boybot/12 yo and girlbot/7 yo and a wife, wifebot/62 yo.
Really made me not want a j*b

reviews.review_title: cool, but it gets boring quick
reviews.review_description: So I got this game because the German Youtuber  Paluten played it and I've bought pretty much every game of his. And I bought it too, and it's actually a lot of fun, including the jokes, but it gets really boring once you've played through everything, even the endless sandbox mode. You always do The Same But all in all, I would still recommend it 👍

Just something that maybe you could add would be a grocery store mode where you work at a grocery store and if you play the mode in overtime, there would be people that would break in and rob you and you would have to throw stuff at them to make them leave so yeah I think that would be a cool update ￼￼

I started off playing this as a good worker but over time I hated the bots and doing things that I wanted to do.
I’ve got suggestions. First make a money system so you can make your own area. You could add more apps to the computer like a work one so you can get paid. For convenience store worker add sausage rolls and pies also add a cash system there. For mechanic make the receipt be able to insert into a computer to get paid. For gourmet chef make a credit card scanner so they can pay you. 

ps if you want a bigger work area make a big roomscale
This game is awesome, it has 4 different jobs to choose from, the hand tracking is great and u really love the auto mechanic, just it would be even better if we got more jobs to choose from.
It was a good game but they need more jobs and mods it would be cool 😎 if they had multiplayer
This game is a og I love this this game so much it better than vacation sim W game jobbot is better than vacation bot
The game is really fun. There’s so much to do. I would definitely recommend this game to anyone ￼￼

Ummm so Ive been playing this game for like 2 months now and it surely is amazing, you have so many options and use creativity and the graphics and quality is very good especially for VR. Awesome game and great for beginners at VR to understand the motions.
This game is a classic it’s fun I like how you can throw stuff at the robots

reviews.review_title: Easily one of the best games I've played
reviews.review_description: Although when I launch the game, it forces me into a roomscale when I was in stationary before but other than that, amazing game
Pls abdeit
Game too scary, I don’t like job, I mean j#b. Krkfjfkkddjjfx,

this is a really good game but i don't want it in my library so i really want this game to add a uh refund system and this also has to be with other paid vr games but overall it's a very great game you should download it but if people don't want the game anymore the meta should  refund the system

reviews.review_title: I love this game so much
reviews.review_description: I LOVE THIS GAMEEEE THE GRAPHICS I LOVE THE ART STYLEE I LOVE EVERY SINGLE THING ABOUT IT 5/5 stars

It's one of the best game for people who just bought their first VR headset. It's extremely easy to play and gives a ton of fun. But... It's also pretty short - it took me two hours to finish it. There's endless mode but it becomes boring fairly quickly. As a horizon+ game it's a must play, but outside outside of it the maximum price id recommend is 10 dollars

reviews.review_title: Been wanting this game since I was five!
reviews.review_description:
I have been wanting this game for SO FRIGGIN LONG! I first saw it when I was little maybe around five and I immediately wanted it even tho I didn’t have a vr.
Now for my 13 birthday this year my parents got it for me and I finished all the jobs in one day but that didn’t matter I thought it was super fun and right now I’m playing vacation simulator and I’m loving it also! I would like it very much if you made a Job Sim 2 with more different jobs like fast food, car wash, bartender, or even a lawyer. Even if there won’t be a Job sim 2 some more levels would be nice. Devs keep up the good work!

Job simulator is very fun!

When your a store clerk it’s fun (other than getting robed) 
The minigames to do and play like give a child some sweets 🍭 

So I recommend to get this 5 stars 🌟

When I played this game today, I loved how the game looked. I seen YouTubers play this, so I decided to download the game. When I downloaded it, I did not realize how Fun this game is. This game is a great game to help me with my stress.

I've been playing this game for a while, and I get bored of doing the same things over and over. Could you add stuff like amusement park worker, law enforcement, firefighter, and other jobs like that.
Fun

Can u guys please add free froam mode there is other places in the jobs but I really like how store Clark was rearrange like u can restock the shelves  give the plates to the customer your self
Free roam mode would really cool

To be honest, i really like job simulator. Job simulator was the first game i got on my headset, but i have been wanting yall to add somethong. So, imagine playing job simulator alone, kinda boring right? now imagine playing with friends, that's way better! a multiplayer mode would be perfect. Getting back into the game again with others would be amazing, doing jobs together, throwing stuff everywhere, and having fun would be a W. So please, a multiplayer mode would be amazing, so making one would not be that bad of a idea.

developer_response.body: Check out Dimensional Double Shift! You can job together in DDS. https://www.meta.com/experiences/dimensional-double-shift/4449903565103159/

reviews.review_description: Easy to beat and isn’t as fun once you’re done don’t think it’s worth 25 though
